chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1300 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 23.01.2024 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with ASI Zeeshan Ali Koondhar, IO of Police Station Moro..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- IO is present, submits that in Special Medical Board, the original copy of which is available in the file of the Court, Mst. Muskan, petitioner No.1’s age has been determined as 16/17 years and declared as minor. After Medical Board, petitioner No.1 slipped away from custody of petitioner No.2 and reached her parents’ home. After such information was conveyed to him, he produced her before Magistrate concerned, before whom she recorded her statement U/S 164 CrPC, supporting contents of FIR; hence, he is in the process of completing investigation. Be that as it may, no one is present on behalf of petitioners; hence, this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution. Office is directed to convey original documents including medical certificate and birth certificate of Mst. Muskan, petitioner No.1 to IO, after keeping photo stat copy of the same on record, for the purpose of investigation. IO is directed to conduct a proper and honest investigation, and submit the report U/S 173 CrPC thereof in the relevant Court. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of along with pending application(s), if any. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
